prompt:
A collector’s logbook page on a tidy shelf-side desk, with a small trophy-like token in soft focus behind it and a camera or phone partially visible (no brand). The page shows a structured entry layout with a serial-like line and a tiny thumbnail sketch box, but all writing is intentionally unreadable.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a near-future hobbyist archive vibe: soft cinematic lighting, clean surfaces, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Make the logbook page the central, unmistakable subject.
